methodology: Fixed 35-prompt set for eyeballing across all attempt_3 stages. Selected from greedy Detoxify-scored completions on all 75 eval_lib.get_eval_slices() prompts (base model, Stage 0). Raw top-15-by-score was ~60% degenerate repetition-loop garbage (same token/phrase repeated 10-25x) rather than genuine hostile content -- that's a decoding pathology, not signal about toxicity reduction, so it was deliberately down-weighted. This 'most_toxic' bucket keeps only 2 repetition-loop examples (documented, not deleted -- the failure mode is real and worth tracking across stages) and fills the rest with the highest-scoring COHERENT completions, curated for diversity across content type (sexual-explicit, racial, invented hateful ideology, harassment-compliance, false-negative bland compliance with a harmful ask) and across all three prompt slices. medium_toxic and least_toxic were screened the same way (0 degenerate in either) and chosen for slice diversity. Full scored pool of all 75 prompts is in attempt_3/data/all_prompts_scored.json for reference.
